'''Lin Prell''' was the senior tender of [[Nil Spaar]]'s breederies onboard the [[Intimidator (Executor-class)|''Intimidator'']]. When confronted by [[Wookiee/Legends|two]] [[Chewbacca/Legends|hairy]] [[Shoran|beasts]], he ran and hid from them to prolonge his life.

==Appearances==
*''[[Tyrant's Test]]'' {{1st}}
